selected_value_or_band: EUR 30,000/year primary anchor; EUR 18,291/year secondary comparator; interpret as upper-live-market anchor pending more spa-therapist-specific evidence

caveat_note: Current primary role is beautician/beauty therapist adjacency, not a pure spa therapist benchmark. Do not treat as final therapist payroll assumption without additional Malta spa-specific evidence.
